documents.topic: Tiered non-closure read: full() -> institute Array<Byte> (eager) + mapped() -> Memory.Map (lazy/demand-paged, for large content); both vend Span<Byte> via Span.Protocol; closures kept additively; bytes not String; generic strategy-merge verified-feasible but deferred; async mapped() toolchain-blocked
documents.statusDetail: implementation deferred 2026-06-26 (parked by principal, not blocked); async-mapped rider gated on 6.4 adoption

documents.topic: Storage type for File.Name: [Path.Char]/[Byte] vs String_Primitives.String and the ~Copyable cascade
